series_metadata.series_description: This record series consists of documents from the pre-hiring screening process related to individuals hired and individuals not hired by the agency, including: polygraph examinations, BCII/FBI criminal-record checks, and results of physical examinations.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain for one year or during the probationary period, whichever is longer, for individuals who are hired, then destroy. Retain for one year for individuals not hired, then destroy. ; Paper: Unless converted into electronic format that has been verified as an accurate copy, maintain paper format for one year or during the probationary period, whichever is longer, for individuals who are hired, then destroy. Unless converted into electronic format that has been verified as an accurate copy, maintain paper format for one year for individuals not hired, then destroy. Once converted into verified machine-readable format, if at all, shred paper copies., Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Shred
